================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 C6 74 B4 B0 CA
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x6A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : -1
RetValSize     : 20

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x6A
PayloadLen   : 20

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
01 01 00 00 01 00 01 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
00 00 00 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
01 01 00 00 01 00 01 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
00 00 00 00 

[BINARY DATA]
